metrics.heading: Overall Mood
metrics.phrase: Maruti's financial performance was steady but with room for improvement.
metrics.label: Steady

metrics.heading: Company Outlook
metrics.phrase: Management sees a promising future ahead with ambitious growth plans.
metrics.label: Promising

metrics.heading: Sustainability
metrics.phrase: Maruti is committed to clean practices as part of its sustainability efforts.
metrics.label: Clean

metrics.heading: Environmental
metrics.phrase: The company aims to be green and reduce environmental impact through EVs and infrastructure.
metrics.label: Green

metrics.heading: People & Society
metrics.phrase: Maruti values its people, maintaining strong relationships within the community.
metrics.label: Good

metrics.heading: Corporate Governance
metrics.phrase: Management is open and honest in their dealings with investors and stakeholders.
metrics.label: Strong

metrics.heading: Management Honesty
metrics.phrase: Investors trust Maruti's management team for being transparent and upfront.
metrics.label: Open

metrics.heading: Financial Health
metrics.phrase: Despite some issues, Maruti has a solid financial foundation but needs to improve its profitability.
metrics.label: Poor

metrics.heading: Growth Plans
metrics.phrase: Maruti plans to be very ambitious in growing both domestically and internationally.
metrics.label: Very Ambitious

metrics.heading: Risk Level
metrics.phrase: There are high risks associated with their growth strategies and market conditions.
metrics.label: High Risk

metrics.heading: Investor Confidence
metrics.phrase: Investors trust Maruti's management, seeing it as a very reliable company.
metrics.label: Very Trusted
